headline: Shark’s versatile ChillPill cooling system is back to its best price
summary: Shark's ChillPill cooling system is available at its lowest price. This versatile device combines a fan with an evaporative mister. It offers an easy way to stay cool during summer.

headline: TikTok is testing an AI likeness detection tool
summary: TikTok is testing a new opt-in tool to detect AI-generated likenesses. The feature allows creators to report AI content to the platform. It's currently being tested with some US creators, similar to YouTube's efforts.

headline: Pebble founder Eric Migicovsky says his 30-day warranty is all about trust
summary: Pebble founder Eric Migicovsky defends the short 30-day warranty on new smartwatches. He stresses that customer trust is paramount for product reliability. Buyers should understand the terms and trust Pebble to resolve issues.

headline: Apple Music is getting a price hike
summary: Apple Music subscription prices have increased across all plans. An individual plan now costs $11.99, family plans $19.99, and student plans $6.99. This represents a price increase of $1 to $3 depending on the plan.

headline: Pick up a Big and Tall Gaming Chair for Less Than $140 With Free Shipping on Amazon
summary: A Big and Tall gaming chair is currently on sale for under $140. The deal includes free shipping directly from Amazon. It offers a comfortable and affordable option for gamers.

headline: Sydney Sweeney to Star in New Sleepy Hollow Movie Snapped Up By Sony
summary: Sydney Sweeney is set to star in a new 'Sleepy Hollow' film. Sony has acquired the movie, which is a reimagining of the classic tale. The project is based on Lindsey Anderson Beer’s novel 'Hollow'.

headline: This TSA-Compliant Daran 28,000mAh 100W LiFePO4 Power Station Drops to Just $48.57
summary: The Daran 28,000mAh 100W LiFePO4 Power Station is on sale for $48.57. It is a compact and TSA-compliant power station. Weighing under 3 pounds, it's considered one of the smallest available.

headline: Pick Up a Powerful and Infinitely Reusable Cordless Electric Air Duster for $19 After Coupon
summary: A powerful cordless electric air duster is available for $19 with a coupon. This device is infinitely reusable, offering an eco-friendly alternative to canned air. It's perfect for cleaning dusty PCs and electronics.

headline: Burnham finalising cabinet ahead of becoming PM on Monday
summary: Burnham is finalizing his cabinet appointments before becoming Prime Minister on Monday. The new Labour leader vows to deliver the biggest change in British politics in 40 years. He is preparing to lead his government with significant reforms.

headline: Zeffman: Burnham promises huge change - but leaves questions about plan to deliver it
summary: Burnham promised the biggest change in British politics in 40 years in his first speech. While ambitious, his plan for delivering such radical change remains unclear. This has raised questions about the practicality of his proposals.

headline: Mother of Henry Nowak killer jailed for removing knife from murder scene
summary: Kiran Kaur has been jailed for removing a knife from a murder scene. The knife was used in the killing of student Henry Nowak. Her actions were an attempt to conceal evidence related to the murder.

headline: Bayeux Tapestry in 'wonderful state' after journey to London, French minister says
summary: The Bayeux Tapestry is in 'a wonderful state' following its journey to London. The French culture minister confirmed its excellent condition to the BBC. This historic artifact is now safely housed in its new location.
